Latest Causes

Membership FAQs

Here are answers to some commonly asked questions about our membership options.
How do I apply for membership?

  • You may apply by selecting your preferred membership option online, click on the ‘Apply Now’ button on the preferred option and complete the online application form.

    The online application form may take about 5 to 10 minutes.

    All membership applications received will be reviewed by our Membership Committee. This process may take up to 3 working days.

Why should my organisation become a corporate member?

  • Corporate membership is suitable for organisations looking to access high-level closed-door dialogues and exclusive networking opportunities with policymakers, diplomats and global leaders. Members can nominate up to 5 attendees to attend each event.

How can I make payment for an approved membership application?

  • If your application is approved by the Membership Committee, you will receive a subscription letter along with a tax invoice with payment details.

    Payment methods include PayNow, Bank Transfer, GIRO and cheque.

How long is the membership?

  • Membership is an annual subscription, and members are sent reminders when the membership is due for renewal.

Can I join the membership at any time?

  • Yes, new members can join at any time of the year. The membership starts on the date of your application and continues for a year.

Can I still apply individually if my organisation has a corporate membership?

  • We currently do not offer individual membership. Where several individuals from an organisation wish to become members, we recommend corporate membership.
